name: Click to Select File
notes: onClick at line 789 calls handleFileInputClick(), which programmatically triggers a hidden <input type='file'> via React ref — the div's click does not open a file dialog directly; it delegates via fileInputRef.current.click().
Accepted types are enforced twice: by the hidden input's accept attribute (.pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png) and by multer's fileFilter on the backend (application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png only).

Upload is auth-gated: POST /api/upload requires at least one of JWT Bearer token, session cookie, or API key (three coexisting auth systems); uploaded_by is set to req.user.email if resolved, else null.
After successful upload the DB trigger trg_sync_to_v2 copies the new row to documents_v2 but deliberately omits the tags column, leaving tags null in documents_v2 until the user manually saves them.
